HeroItem.Title: Code Buoy
HeroItem.SubTitle: Software & Technology solutions geared toward Small Business and Local Government

AboutUsItem.Item1Description: We are a team of technology professionals that have developed software solutions and consulted for a wide range of businesses and organizations of all sizes.

HighlightSubTitle: Quality and Affordable Technology Solutions for your Business

HighlightItems.Title: Services
HighlightItems.Descr: We are a full fledged technology shop and can provide a wide range of technology services for your business including integrations and process automation.

HighlightItems.Title: Affordable Prices
HighlightItems.Descr: Most technology needs for businesses have already been developed, so we can solve your issue without breaking the bank. We strive to be fair and honest.

HighlightItems.Title: Responsive
HighlightItems.Descr: We know time is money, so if we cannot accomplish your goal, we will tell you up front. We will not try and sell you products and services you do not need.

Blogs.Title: Free Consulting for Small Business
Blogs.Descr: We love entrepreneurship! We believe the economy is driven by small and medium-sized businesses, and we want them to thrive. To support your efforts, we offer free virtual consulting on Fridays to discuss any aspects of technology impacting your organization. Our niche is using technology to make your business operate more efficiently. Whether that’s automating a routine process or making different systems talk to each other, we are here to help. Reach out to us via email to schedule a meeting.

ProductItems.Title: Lobbyist Tracker
ProductItems.Descr: Record interactions between Lobbyists and Public Officials

ProductItems.Title: Simple Sites
ProductItems.Descr: $75 Website Templates to get online fast

PriceItem.Title: Simple Sites Pricing
PriceItem.Descr: Our Starter template is sufficient to build an effective 'one page' website (similiar to the page you are on now) displaying the most important information for your customers. You provide us the content and images and we upload it to our servers.
